allies.rationale_text: Feynman-technique helps theory-induced-blindness reveal where the model falls apart by forcing plain-language explanation.
allies.source_quote: By forcing an individual to explain a concept in plain language, it reveals where the model starts to fall apart.

allies.rationale_text: First-principles-thinking counters theory-induced-blindness by stripping away inherited assumptions and rebuilding from facts.
allies.source_quote: First Principles Thinking serves as an antidote by stripping away all those assumptions, leaving only a set of facts and a desired outcome.

allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking helps theory-induced-blindness by slowing the thinker down enough to compare frames instead of defaulting to the familiar one.
allies.source_quote: The ally is System 2, the reflective mind. System 2 allows us to slow down and ask for reinforcement by engaging in comparison, choice, and ordered reasoning.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias perpetuates theory-induced-blindness by absorbing contradictory evidence into the current frame instead of revising it.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Theory-induced-blindness conflicts with confirmation-bias when one framework absorbs contradictory evidence without revision.
structured_tensions.source_quote: theory-induced-blindness vs confirmation-bias: theory-induced-blindness conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when one framework absorbs contradictory evidence without revision.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Theory-induced-blindness conflicts with commitment-and-consistency-bias when public attachment to theory blocks reframing.
structured_tensions.source_quote: theory-induced-blindness vs commitment-and-consistency-bias: theory-induced-blindness conflicts with commitment-and-consistency-bias (commitment and consistency bias) when public attachment to theory blocks reframing.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on reframing allies that break model lock-in plus an explicit tension surface around confirmation and public attachment to theory.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor philosophy sprawl beyond the source-backed anti-frame-lock and anti-confirmation surface.
open_questions: Availability-style substitution is source-real antagonist, but confirmation-bias and commitment-and-consistency-bias were the cleaner bounded conflicts into the current graph vocabulary.
